prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/316-sheet.numbers in Numbers. Insert a new (blank) column before column B. (Click the column B header > Add Column Before, or Table menu > Add Column Before.) Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'numbers add_column ~/Desktop/kinbench/316-sheet.numbers "Sheet 1"'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/316-col-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
